event: Alchemists at work in a laboratory
description: Three men in an interior workshop or laboratory. At center, a stout man in a brown monk's robe and a taller man in a red coat examine a glass vessel held up to the light. At left, a third elderly figure in dark clothing tends to a small furnace with a bellows. Shelves above hold glass bottles and flasks. An open illustrated book lies on the floor beside a copper basin. The room is dimly lit with a dark stone fireplace at the left and a small glowing furnace at the right.
